issues.detail: The instructions do not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases beyond the provided examples.
The GPG key download uses curl without verifying a checksum.

scenarios.name: Custom rule for shell spawn in container
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the skill's exact rule (spawned_process+container macros, full shell name list with parent allowlist, mitre_execution tag, and the documented output template); baseline drops to raw evt.type=execve, misses several shells and tags, and omits container.image.repository / proc.pname fields.

scenarios.name: Helm install on Kubernetes with Slack alerting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented chart name and bundled falcosidekick subchart with --set driver.kind=modern_ebpf and slack.webhookurl; baseline installs falcosidekick as a separate chart and omits the modern_ebpf driver flag.
